content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！《忘却前夜》新OST已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用。

**忘却前夜OST丨祈岁节EP·疾驰·欢愉专列**
各位旅客，大家好！
祈岁佳节即将来临，在这阖家团圆、辞旧迎新的美好时刻，本次列车全体乘务人员，向千里归乡、旅途劳顿的您，致以最诚挚的祝福——
祝您祈岁快乐，阖家欢愉，一路疾驰，万事如意！<(￣︶￣)↗[GO!]

✦ 曲：F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ 企划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens new OST was released today. Welcome everyone to listen, download and share.
If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST┊Spring Festival EP: Hectic · Skybound Rail**
Greetings, passengers!
The Spring Festival is fast approaching! In this joyous season of reunions and new beginnings, our entire crew extends the most heartfelt wishes to all you weary travelers making the long journey home:
Wishing you a happy Spring Festival, joyous family gatherings, a swift ride, and the absolute best! <(￣︶￣)↗[GO!]

✦ Composer: F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ Planning: B.I.A.V. Studio

**01. 急停！-Emergency Stop!**
各位旅客，大家好，非常抱歉地通知您，由于列车长的个人心情，本次欢愉专列将在此临时停车。具体开车时间，我们将在自相残杀结束后随时为您广播通知。
停车期间，列车的空调、照明和卫生间均可正常使用，请您根据杀戮需求酌情占用，以免不发生危险。
毕竟，欢愉专列的义务，就是给所有旅客带去欢笑～(￣▽￣～)(～￣▽￣)～

Attention passengers, we regret to inform you that due to the conductor's mood, this express will be making an unscheduled stop here. We will announce the exact departure time over the PA system once the mutual slaughter has concluded.
During this stop, the air conditioning, lighting, and restrooms will remain fully operational. Please use them at your discretion based on your slaughtering needs, so as to avoid not being in danger.
After all, the sole duty of joyous express is to bring laughter to all our passengers! ~(￣▽￣~)(~￣▽￣)~

**02. 好一朵茉莉花-What a Lovely Jasmine Flower**
请注意：列车前方到站，磐龙古国。请在磐龙古国下车的旅客提前学习《好一朵茉莉花》的演唱技巧。
因为，你们已经没机会下车了 φ(≧ω≦*)♪

Attention please: The next station is the Panlong Empire. Passengers disembarking at Panlong are strongly advised to brush up on their vocal techniques for What a Lovely Jasmine Flower.
Because... well, you're never getting off this train anyway~ φ(≧ω≦)♪

**03. 祈岁焰火-Spring Festival Fireworks**
让这支短暂的舞于流淌中化为永恒吧。
下一个祈岁之夜，我们终将在月光下重逢。
*父女情深，感人肺腑 (ノへ￣、)

May this fleeting dance become eternal within the river of time.
Come the night of the next Spring Festival, we shall reunite beneath the moonlight.
*Father and daughter... how touching. (ノへ￣、)

**01. 欲落之月-The Falling Moon**
月亮嘻嘻发笑，月亮窃窃私语。
月亮说命运啊，命运啊，命运要落下来了。

The moon giggles, the moon whispers.
Fate, oh fate, the moon says—fate is about to fall.
